title: Endless Store
description: Endless mazes of boxes, trash, and furniture
body:
![Welcome the newbies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0538c7a7418d5b83b38f4aad780ccdf53dba0a61_0.webp)
# Welcome 
to the endless store mod, yeah, you know what I'm talking about. It is currently at an early stage of development and there is not much content in it, but enough for you to feel _liminality_ in Minecraft. I hope you can have fun in our store, because **you won't be able to leave it just by dying...** We also **don't let you in with your stuff!**

## Mod includes:
- 1 Dimension
- 5 Entities
- 5 Biomes
- 90+ Furniture
- New weapons and armor
- And many more in the future

You can also watch the video with our mascot, look, he's not scary at all!
